rationale.D1: Confirmed: GenericSuperstructure<G> and GenericRollers<G> are parameterized generic bases reused across all shooter/intake mechanisms (not just swerve), each with Real+Sim impls, selected in a single switch block in RobotContainer — true L4 library-grade abstraction.
rationale.D2: Confirmed: ShooterController and IntakeController are explicit per-subsystem FSMs with real state enums (ShooterState, IntakeState) and transition logic in periodic(); discounted to 2.5 because there is no single robot-wide Superstructure coordinator fanning goals out — coordination is caller-side in RobotContainer button bindings.
rationale.D3: Confirmed: maple-sim (org.ironmaple) wired for full swerve drivetrain+gyro+modules, FlywheelSim in ShooterFlywheelIOSim, GenericSuperstructureIOSim/GenericRollersIOSim for all mechanisms, plus VisionIOPhotonvisionSim — whole-robot sim workflow present.
rationale.D4: Confirmed: no src/test directory exists; CI workflow runs only `./gradlew build` (no `test` step); no @Test annotations found anywhere — D4=0.
rationale.D5: Confirmed: AdvantageKit fully wired — Logger.processInputs in GenericSuperstructure and GenericRollers base classes covers all subsystems, REPLAY mode wired in Robot.java with WPILOGReader; discounted from 4 because there are no dedicated replay IO variant classes (REPLAY falls through to default/null IOs).
rationale.D6: Confirmed: 66 PathPlanner .path/.auto files, AutoBuilder.configure wired, pathfindToPose called via RobotState.getPathPlannerApproachPoseCommand, AlignToPoseCommand used in RobotContainer — on-the-fly pose alignment present; no Choreo files.
rationale.D7: Confirmed: dedicated RobotState singleton owns SwerveDrivePoseEstimator+vision fusion, Vision subsystem uses VisionIO interface with VisionIOPhotonvisionSim variant, multi-camera support (3 cameras), rejection logic and per-measurement stdDev tuning, InterpolatingTreeMap for shooting table — full L4 world model.
rationale.D8: Confirmed: GitHub Actions CI on push/PR running build+spotless, Spotless formatter enforced (build depends on spotlessApply), TEMPLATE-2026 repo in team org, 5 seasons of tracked repos; discounted from 4 because library is bundled in-repo (lib/ package), not versioned as a separate dependency.
